The '''Sixth Fleet''' was one of the nine main interstellar battlegroups which made up the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|navy]] of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] government during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].<ref name="Tempest">''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''</ref>

It represented the first expansion of the Galactic Alliance naval structure beyond the five battlegroups which had comprised the main force of the Fleet under the former [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], and probably still in the early years of the new government.<ref name="CrackenThreat">''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]''</ref>

Well before the end of 40 ABY, however, it had been joined by the [[Seventh Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Seventh]], [[Eighth Fleet|Eighth]] and [[Ninth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Ninth]] Fleets.<ref name="Tempest" />

By 40 ABY the Sixth fleet was under the direct command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]] along with the [[First Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|First Fleet]] as it took part in the weeks-long [[Battle of Kuat (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kuat]]. In [[44 ABY]], it was in charge of guarding the [[Realspace/Legends|space]] directly above [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Vortex">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Vortex]]''</ref>
